title: 10L + GatedXSA + EMA + TrigramHash + QuadgramHash + SwiGLU (val_bpb=TBD)
author: Vighaneshs

data.description: Exclusive Self Attention with learned per-layer sigmoid gate replacing hard projection removal, allowing adaptive self-value suppression per layer
Exponential moving average replacing SWA, with decay=0.997 and GPU shadow copy updated every step
Hashing token triples into learned embedding tables added at input, providing explicit n-gram context at zero attention overhead
Hashing token quadruples into learned embedding tables added at input, complementing trigram and bigram hashes
Replacing relu² activation with SwiGLU in MLP with mlp_mult=2.0, maintaining parameter count
BigramHash with 10240 buckets restored to original size due to 10L model size budget

data.scope: MLP weights (int5), attention and n-gram projections (int6), embedding tables (int8)

data.description: Orthogonal initialization with muP output scaling applied to XSA layers
Encoder-decoder skip connections with 5 encoder and 6 decoder layers
Weight tying between input and output embeddings

novel_contributions: Gated XSA with learned per-layer sigmoid gate for adaptive self-value suppression
EMA with decay=0.997 replacing SWA for continuous weight averaging
TrigramHash embedding providing explicit 3-gram context at input layer
QuadgramHash embedding providing explicit 4-gram context at input layer
Use of SwiGLU activation replacing relu² in MLP with maintained parameter count
Restoration of BigramHash bucket size to 10240 due to 10L model size budget
Mixed quantization scheme with int5 for MLP, int6 for attention and n-gram projections, int8 for embedding tables
U-Net style skip connections with encoder-decoder layers
Orthogonal initialization with muP output scaling applied to XSA layers
